communications.message: We are investigating reports of slow API response times affecting platform access. Our team is actively working to identify the cause and scope of the issue. Detection and security functions remain fully operational. We will provide an update within 30 minutes.

We have identified a configuration change as the cause of elevated API response times. Customers may experience delays or timeouts when accessing the platform via API. Our team is implementing a fix and expects to restore normal performance within the next hour. Next update in 30 minutes.

The configuration change has been reverted and API response times are returning to normal levels. We are monitoring system performance to ensure full stability before resolving this incident. Most customers should now experience normal platform access. Next update in 30 minutes.

This incident has been resolved. API performance has returned to normal and all platform functions are operating as expected. Incident summary: Started at approximately 6:15 AM PT, resolved at 8:45 AM PT (total duration: 2 hours 30 minutes). Impact: Customers experienced slow API response times and intermittent timeouts when accessing the platform. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.
